---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for FAMS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Problem It Solves
Describe the problem this feature would solve. Is your feature request related to a problem?
Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Cases
Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be useful:
- Use case 1: ...
- Use case 2: ...

## 📸 Mockups/Examples
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples from other applications.

## 🎓 User Type
Which user roles would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Administrator
- [ ] Operations Officer
- [ ] Instructor
- [ ] Student Pilot
- [ ] Examiner
- [ ] Maintenance Engineer
- [ ] Finance Officer

## ⚡ Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Cannot use FAMS effectively without it
- [ ] High - Significantly impacts workflow
- [ ] Medium - Would be nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
